Subject: Re: we wrote this email for sydney\n\nBody: I need two refunds you guys keep lying and saying you were giving me a refund it been two weeks and you took over $300 from me when I canceled my subscription months a…
Hello?
I'm not understanding what's taking so long it shouldn't take 2 to 3 days for you to do a dispute
I need both of the payments refunded
Yes our team is working on the dispute needful will be done asap
Hello any updates on my refund?
I will be following a dispute with my bank for both transactions
Why would you charge my card again today? $199 I need you to refund me my money both payments you took out.
Okay thank you

Hi Sydney, we’re really sorry for the inconvenience caused. Our team is currently looking into this, and we’ll reach out to you immediately with an update. The refund will be processed as soon as possible. Thank you for …
Please send me my money back. I told you guys to cancel the subscription and you still proceeded to take $199 from my account.

Hi Sydney,  I completely understand your frustration, and I’m really sorry for the inconvenience this has caused. I’m actively working on this right now to get it resolved for you. Please rest assured that the refund is …
Can you please remove your website off of my google platform
Please leave your message for 7049415630. Please leave your message for 7049415630.
Hi Sydney, Shakti here from Zoca. I wanted to get in touch with you and see if you’re available for a quick call right now. Please let me know.

Wishing you a Merry Christmas and a lovely festive season! Thank you so much for your trust and support this year - it’s truly been a pleasure working with you and being part of your journey. If you’d like to catch up be…

It's locked right now due to the missed payment. Can I kindly share the payment link with you? The leads atomically gets locked post 15 days of a user missing their payment so your leads got locked on 25 th on November a…
It\'s been locked for months. It was locked once you took that payment from me, but it\'s cool. You can just close the account out. I don\'t feel like going back-and-forth.
See it was locked the entire time
And I\'ve been out the entire month of November because I had surgery. I don\'t go back to work until this week coming.
I\'m telling you it was locked the entire time. The only thing that was coming through was my clients that were booking so I just stopped checking it.
And I have the proof to show you that I had surgery on 12 November
Hi Sydney, on our end it looks the leads were unlocked until the next invoice was generated. Would you be open to connecting on a call as the traffic on your profile is going really good
Hi Sydney, I hope you are well. We haven't received the payment for November, can you kindly look into it
Hello, I\'ve been locked out of the account the entire month since y\'all took that first payment I\'ve been locked out so if y\'all want, y\'all can go ahead and close it
Please leave your message for 704-941-5630. Please leave your message for 704-941-5630.
Your call has been forwarded to voicemail the person you're trying
Hi Sydney, I hope you are well and the app is working fine for you. Please let me know your availability to connect on a meeting next week.
